text.tspan: The voice tutor is a gated learning loop: speech is segmented into a completed turn, transcribed, enriched with voice signals,
optionally evaluated as retrieval evidence, routed through a Socratic LLM, spoken back, then converted into the next progress check.
Active check answers are evaluated first.
Assistant text is revealed and spoken.
window sent to turn check: last 8 seconds
They never make an answer wrong by themselves.
updateSessionMemory() records latest learner turn, tutor move, focus concept,
strengths, misconceptions, open questions, and last effective strategy.
TTS provider browser -> no server audio
Speech synthesis failure -> reveal text + browser speech
The LLM does not own continuity.
assistant text is revealed when audio is ready
